name: combat-action-contract
description: Action resolution structures for combat: requests, results, and action type definitions

action_request.target_id: string|null — target combatant (null for self-targeting actions)

cast_spell.spell_level: int — slot level used (0 for cantrip)

dash.base_movement: int — normal movement speed in feet

ready.readied_action: string — action type to perform when triggered

action_result.damage_dealt: int — damage applied (0 if no damage)

state_mutations.hp_change: int — HP change on target (negative = damage, positive = healing)
state_mutations.death_save_triggered: bool — whether target dropped to 0 HP

action_type_rules.attack: Roll d20 + attack_bonus vs target AC. Hit = roll damage. Natural 20 = critical (double damage dice). Natural 1 = auto-miss. Dispatches to atomic_ops/attack_operations.
action_type_rules.cast_spell: Check spell slot availability, range, components. Target rolls saving throw vs spell_dc if applicable. On fail, apply damage/effect. Concentration spells replace existing concentration.
action_type_rules.ability_check: Roll d20 + ability modifier (+ proficiency if proficient) vs DC. Dispatches to atomic_ops/check_operations.
action_type_rules.dodge: Until next turn, attacks against this combatant have disadvantage. Grants advantage on DEX saving throws. Costs action.
action_type_rules.disengage: Movement this turn does not provoke opportunity attacks. Costs action.
action_type_rules.dash: Doubles remaining movement for this turn. Costs action.
action_type_rules.help: Grant advantage on next attack roll or ability check to aided combatant. Costs action.
action_type_rules.ready: Prepare an action with a trigger condition. When trigger occurs, use reaction to perform readied action.

result_codes.action_hit: Attack roll met or exceeded target AC
result_codes.action_critical: Natural 20 on attack roll — double damage dice
result_codes.spell_success: Target failed saving throw or spell has no save
result_codes.action_dodged: Target used Dodge — attack had disadvantage and missed
result_codes.action_completed: Non-attack action completed successfully (dodge, disengage, dash, help, ready)
